architecture_summary: Add a schema-backed, read-only Foundation Mode admission binding that records wholistic_reasoning as operator source intent, canonicalizes to the existing holistic_loop evidence surface, pins source artifact digests, denies runtime authority, and keeps runtime promotion blocked on explicit evidence refs.
data_model_changes: Introduce HolisticLoopReasoningAdmissionBinding with admission_scope, source_artifacts, admission_requirements, authority_boundary, runtime_promotion_blockers, contract_summary, and evidence_refs
Represent runtime promotion blockers as exact evidence refs that remain unsatisfied in Foundation Mode
Represent denied runtime authorities as explicit allowed=false records
rollback_plan: Revert the added binding schema, Foundation example, validator, tests, documentation, SDLC sidecars, protocol manifest entry, proof matrix generated outputs, and workspace preflight check; rerun schema, protocol, proof coverage, SDLC security, and governance preflight validators.
migration_plan: No runtime migration. This is an additive Foundation Mode evidence binding and does not mutate runtime state.
